Comment.value: This script is called from both translation scripts and from review scripts

Stage Name Text status HT Text status MT 1. Language added - (text does not exist) - (text does not exist) 2. Text prepared for translation Not translated Not translate 3. Original text sent Not translated Sent to API + async translation id:¶[id_from_api] (async only) 4. Translated text imported Not reviewed Not reviewed 5. Translation in review In progress In progress 6. Translation approved Approved Approved
Caller can be either "Title localisation" or "Package localisation"
Exception can be "" - normal case "Reviewed" - Texts that been reviewed and set to "In progress" or "Approved" will not be changed-
Text status can be: 1. Not translated 2. Sent to API (only asynchronous machine translation) 3. Not reviewed 4. In progress 5. Approved

Calculation.Text: "You are about to set ALL texts in this localisation to status " & $status & ". Are you sure you want to do this?"
"You are about to set texts in this localisation to status " & $status & ". Texts that been set to \"Approved\" or \"In progress\" will NOT change status. Are you sure you want to do this?"

"You are about to set texts in this localisation to status " & $status & ". Only texts where the original text has been modified AFTER the translated text was created will be affected. ¶¶Are you sure you want to do this?"

Comment.value: Get global texts - with title_id but no package_id
Omit texts where the original text is unchanged after the localised text was created.

Calculation.Text: FAT Text translated::CreationTimestamp > FAT Text @ Translation::ModificationTimeStamp

Comment.value: Creation time stamp will be changed and texts will be replaced by original texts

Calculation.Text: "Found " & $number_of_changed_texts & " texts that been changed since translation was created. ¶ Do you want to remove existing translations and prepare for re-translation?¶¶ Remember to start a new translation directly after this operation."
"Found " & $number_of_changed_texts & " texts that been changed since translation was created. ¶ Do you want to set these texts to Not reviewed?"

Comment.value: Set Creation date to today and set texts to orginial language
When going back in progress - change stage to 2.
